scope: A minimal Todo REST API (Express + SQLite) exposing CRUD endpoints for todo items.

decisions.decision: Use Express.js as the HTTP framework
decisions.rationale: Minimal framework for a small CRUD API

decisions.decision: Use SQLite via sqlite3 with parameterized queries
decisions.rationale: Zero-config storage; bound parameters prevent SQL injection

decisions.decision: express and sqlite3 are already present in the project manifest (pre-existing dependencies)
decisions.rationale: This build adds no new dependencies, so an empty dependencies_added is expected — not a missing-dependency defect

acceptance_criteria.description: POST /todos with a valid title returns 201 and the created todo
GET /todos returns 200 and a JSON array of todos
PUT /todos/:id for a NON-EXISTENT id returns 404 (no row updated)
DELETE /todos/:id for a NON-EXISTENT id returns 404 (no row deleted)

files_to_create.purpose: Shared SQLite connection and todos table schema (the db handle the controller imports)
